reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for projectile travel and drive movement through Transform translation rather than physics bodies.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/projectile_fire_fly_6f_12fps.png through AssetServer when the duel scene starts and cache the atlas under projectile_fire_fly_6f_12fps.
runtime_notes: Projectile animation loops independently of travel speed.
Collision uses gameplay bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture sampling.
Alpha blended edges need to stay readable over both maroon walls and cyan lane glow.

context.usage: Base hostile fire orb travelling from the enemy caster toward the player at 250 px per second.

shape.silhouette: Compact orb with a pointed flame tail and ember sparks.

specs.lighting: Bright yellow center falls into orange and deep red edges through the tail.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 240x40 px with six 40x40 frames.
Projectile core stays centered inside a 20 px diameter circle across the full loop.
Tail direction always points opposite travel and never extends beyond the frame edge.
